name: Document Processing & Analysis
description: Document intelligence toolkit for ingesting, parsing, summarizing, and validating structured and unstructured documents. Handles PDF, DOCX, HTML, Markdown, and plain text formats. Provides text extraction with layout preservation, multi-document summarization, format conversion between common document types, and JSON schema validation for structured data payloads. Designed for research pipelines that need to consume heterogeneous source material reliably.
uncertaintyModel: Document extraction confidence measured by parser coverage ratio (fraction of content successfully extracted vs. total page area). Summarization quality assessed via key-entity retention rate and length-compression ratio. Format conversion fidelity tracked as round-trip diff percentage.
